zh.lifeSummary: 當John Pope於1608年出生在英國倫敦時，他的父親John Blake Pope II28歲，母親Bridget Marcy “Mary” Halsnoth28歲。他於大約1631年與Jane Clapp在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼多爾斯特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1646年4月10日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可多爾斯特享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Pope于1608年出生在英国倫敦时，他的父亲John Blake Pope II28岁，母亲Bridget Marcy “Mary” Halsnoth28岁。他于大约1631年与Jane Clapp在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼多爾斯特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1646年4月10日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可多爾斯特享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pope
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English pope (derived via Old English from Late Latin papa ‘bishop, pope’, from Greek pappas ‘father’, in origin a nursery word.) In the early Christian Church, the Latin term was at first used as a title of respect for male clergy of every rank, but in the Western Church it gradually came to be restricted to bishops, and then only to the bishop of Rome; in the Eastern Church it continued to be used of all priests (see Popov , Papas ). The nickname would have been used for a vain or pompous man, or for someone who had played the part of the pope in a pageant or play. The surname is also present in Ireland and Scotland.

variants.name: Popov
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Russian Nikolay, Oleg, Grigoriy, Anatoly, Andrei, Arkadi, Dmitriy, Mikhail, Sergey.  Bulgarian or Macedonian Atanas, Dimitar, Yordan.  Serbian Bosko, Bozidar, Branko.

Russian, Bulgarian, Macedonian, Serbian, and Rusyn: patronymic from pop ‘priest’, from Greek pappas ‘father’ (compare English Pope ). The name may sometimes derive from a nickname, but celibacy was not enjoined on priests of the Orthodox Church and so the name can indeed mean ‘son of the priest’. In many cases, however, the Russian name means no more than ‘of the priest’ and designates a servant of a priest. Compare Popoff , see also Pop 2, Popovic , and Popovski 1.
Jewish (American): most likely a shortened form of   Popovski   2. Compare   Popoff  .

variants.name: Papke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Bernhard, Erwin, Hans, Otto, Willi.
North German (also Päpke): nickname from a diminutive of Low German pape, Dutch paepe ‘pope’. Compare Pope .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When John Pope was born in 1608, in London, England, his father, John Blake Pope II, was 28 and his mother, Bridget Marcy “Mary” Halsnoth, was 28. He married Jane Clapp about 1631, in Dorchester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 10 April 1646, in Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Pope est né en 1608, à Londres, Angleterre, son père, John Blake Pope II, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Bridget Marcy “Mary” Halsnoth, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Jane Clapp environ 1631, à Dorchester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 10 avril 1646, à Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 38 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Pope è nato il nel 1608 nel London, England, il suo padre, John Blake Pope II, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Bridget Marcy “Mary” Halsnoth, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Jane Clapp circa 1631, nel Dorchester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 10 aprile 1646, nel Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Popeが1608年にイギリスロンドンで生まれた時，父John Blake Pope IIは28歳，母Bridget Marcy “Mary” Halsnothは28歳であった。約1631年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニードールチェスターでJane Clappと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1646年4月10日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクドールチェスターで38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Pope(이)가 1608년 영국 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Blake Pope II(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Bridget Marcy “Mary” Halsnoth(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1631년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 도르체스터에서 Jane Clapp(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1646년 4월 10일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 도르체스터에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Pope nasceu em 1608, em London, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Blake Pope II, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Bridget Marcy “Mary” Halsnoth, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Clapp aproximadamente 1631, em Dorchester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 10 de abril de 1646, em Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 38 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Pope родился в 1608 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, его отцу по имени John Blake Pope II было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Bridget Marcy “Mary” Halsnoth, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Clapp около 1631 г. в местности дорчестир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 10 апреля 1646 г. в местности дорчестир, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 38 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Pope nació en 1608, en London, Inglaterra, su papá, John Blake Pope II, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Bridget Marcy “Mary” Halsnoth, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Jane Clapp aproximadamente 1631, en Dorchester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 10 de abril de 1646, en Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 38 años.
